title: Principal Electrical Engineer
description:
Principal Engineer

Duties and responsibilities of Senior Engineer

• Set design criteria, check design calculation and drawings.

• Prepare concept and sketch designs, and present / seek approval of Team Leader before progressing
to the next stage.

• Formalize standards for specifications, drawings etc. in conjunction with Team Leader.

• Attend design / site meetings.

• Resolve any technical problems faced during the project design and/or construction stages.

• Handle all correspondence including reports, technical specifications, and other documents relating to the projects.

• Prepare and monitor cost and quantity estimates (assist for clarifications only).

• Able to lead projects with a team of engineers /technicians under their charge.

• Fully familiar with coded and local Authority requirements.

• Other duties and responsibilities as reasonably required by the Team Leader / Division Manager.

Additional duties and responsibilities of Principal Engineer

• Assist in business development activities.

• Assist in preparing fee proposals.

• Carry out feasibility work.

• Advise and report to the Team Leader and Division Manager on the adequacy of the services.

• Investigate and recommend engineering system selection

  • Electrical Engineer shall be familiar with High Voltage, Low Voltage, Extra Low Voltage, Lightning Protection Services

Requirements

• Degree in Engineering recognized by Professional Engineering Board.
Master’s degree in building services engineering or equivalent will also be considered.

• 7 to 15 years’ experience in design consultancy within the MEP consultancy field.

• Chartership membership with professional institutions is an advantage (eg: CEng, etc.)

• Ability to communicate / articulate well in English and able to present design ideas, and report to stakeholders independently

• Good interpersonal and communication skills and effective team player skills

postedCompany.description: Meinhardt Group is one of the world’s largest integrated engineering company which provides engineering capabilities in Infrastructure and Environment; Structures; Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing (MEP); Project Management; and Planning and Urban Development. Our specialist capabilities cover Façade Engineering; Environmentally Sustainable Design (ESD); Specialist and Architectural Lighting; Fire Performance Engineering; Integrated Design Management; and Mission Critical Facility Design. Headquartered in Singapore, we currently employ over 5,000 staff located in 55 permanent offices across Australia, Asia, Middle East, North Africa, UK and Europe.
postedCompany.name: MEINHARDT (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
